hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in bun\ *|bun|bunx\ *|bunx|npx\ *|npx) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: use pnpm instead of bun/npx/bunx. pnpm run for scripts, pnpm dlx for one-off packages, pnpm exec for local bins."}}\n';; esac; }
